description: Seed data for service catalogue and prompt templates (four services: AI automation, Market research, Compliance, Document packs). Accepts task shape (name, description_preview, base_price_gbp, document_types, seo_slug) or legacy shape (service_name, description, display_order).

services.name: Workflow Automation Blueprint
services.description_preview: Structured automation plan identifying workflow candidates, tools, and expected efficiency gains.

services.name: Business Process Mapping
services.description_preview: Detailed workflow mapping to identify inefficiencies, compliance gaps, and automation opportunities.

services.name: AI Tool Recommendation Report
services.description_preview: Objective assessment of AI tools matched to requirements, budget, and integration needs.

services.name: Market Research – Basic
services.description_preview: Concise market overview with competitor insights and high-level trends for early-stage decisions.

services.name: Market Research – Advanced
services.description_preview: Comprehensive research report including positioning, pricing logic, and structured findings.

services.name: HMO Compliance Audit
services.description_preview: Structured audit assessing HMO documentation, safety requirements, and licensing obligations.

services.name: Full Compliance Audit Report
services.description_preview: Comprehensive compliance review covering certificates, licensing, deposits, notices, and risk areas.

services.name: Move-In / Move-Out Checklist
services.description_preview: Structured checklist documenting property condition at tenancy start and end to reduce disputes.

services.name: Essential Landlord Document Pack
services.description_preview: Core landlord forms and notices generated from structured inputs.

services.name: Tenancy Legal & Notices Pack
services.description_preview: Tenancy agreements, notices, and guarantor documents prepared using controlled templates.

services.name: Ultimate Landlord Document Pack
services.description_preview: Comprehensive landlord documentation including essential + tenancy + additional supporting records.
